title: Sub Item Parent Summary
excerpt:

posts.author: WTagreen (Alex Green)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m taking a look into a reporting use case where I’d like to break down some of my figures into sub items and then show those figures back up into the parent.

My issue is that some of the numbers I’m taking a look at are percentage’s and I’d like the parents to show an average of the subitems in the summary and not a total. Is there any way to change the behaviour of the summary column?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: If you switch on “Show summary in parent” you can customize the parent column to show an average.
